description: Workable is recruiting and HR software for employers, covering applicant tracking, hiring workflows, employee data, and related HR processes. Its public site also publishes machine-readable discovery metadata and agent-facing tools for the marketing website.
summary: Workable exposes a public HTTP API for recruiting and HR integrations, plus a separate unauthenticated marketing-site OpenAPI index and browser-based WebMCP tools on workable.com.

surfaces.name: Workable marketing site content index API
